institution.name: The University of Texas Rio Grande Valley

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas Rio Grande Valley rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.7k → $12.9k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at The University of Texas Rio Grande Valley are 39% above 6-year earnings ($35.8k → $49.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Texas Rio Grande Valley rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (24.7% → 31.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The University of Texas Rio Grande Valley rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (71.7% → 81.1%).
